case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JUAN CARLOS BARRERA ROMERO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,411.83 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, JUAN CARLOS BARRERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-29-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 8/24/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT ROMERO (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD) AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, JUAN CARLOS BARRERA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, JUAN CARLOS BARRERA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED FEB-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROMERO, JUAN CARLOS BARRERA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-24-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA TOVAR, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROMERO, JUAN CARLOS BARRERA $1,071.83 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,166.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
